title: Lichenya Plateau Mulanje: A Gentler Overnight Above the Clouds
meta_title: Lichenya Plateau Mulanje: Overnight Hiking Guide
meta_description: Plan your Lichenya Plateau Mulanje overnight — rolling grasslands, wildflowers, natural pools & Lichenya Hut. A gentler alternative to Sapitwa Peak.
author: The Thyolo House
excerpt: Lichenya Plateau is Mount Mulanje's most accessible overnight destination — a vast rolling grassland dotted with wildflowers, rock pools, and sweeping views. Here's how to plan the hike, what to pack, and why Thyolo House makes the perfect base camp.
content:
Article written and saved. Here's what's in it:

**Title:** Lichenya Plateau Mulanje: A Gentler Overnight Above the Clouds

**~2,200 words** covering all 6 outlined H2 sections:

1. **Why Lichenya Is Mulanje's Most Rewarding Overnight** — UNESCO context, landscape description, accessibility pitch
2. **The Route Up** — Nnesa trailhead, 21km / 1,700m gain, 3-4 hour ascent, alternative Chambe approach
3. **Life on the Plateau** — grasslands, rock pools, Lichenya Hut (first-come-first-served), camping, stargazing
4. **What to Pack and When to Go** — May-August best, full packing list, wet season warning
5. **Lichenya vs Sapitwa** — comparison lists, two-trip progression, conservation note (bauxite mining threat + UNESCO protection)
6. **Start & Finish at Thyolo House** — 4-day sample itinerary, restaurant/pool recovery, WhatsApp CTA

**SEO:** Target keyword in first paragraph + 3 more natural uses. Meta description under 160 chars.

**Internal links:** All 3 required (`/blog/climbing-sapitwa-peak-guide`, `/blog/how-to-get-to-mulanje-malawi`, `/blog/mulanje-hikes-complete-guide`) plus `/rooms/` and homepage.

**Images:** 4 figures with descriptive alt text and captions (forest-view, garden-view, pool-area, outdoor-dining).

**CTAs:** WhatsApp link + email near the end.
